summary: Generate mode: Tested all new trading system features including Auto-Trading Engine (start/stop/reset), Early Pump Detection, Smart Wallet Tracker, API Failover, Crash Recovery, Activity Feed, System Modules, and portfolio calculation. Created 25 new backend tests (all passing) and 16 new frontend E2E tests (all passing). Total 99 backend tests passed, 41+ frontend tests across all spec files passed.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error - duplicate endpoint definition exists. The working endpoint is POST /smart-wallets

endpoints_verified.POST /auto-trading/start: PASS - Returns config object with scan_interval_seconds, max_open_trades
endpoints_verified.POST /auto-trading/stop: PASS - Returns session_stats with scan_count, trades_executed, win_rate
endpoints_verified.POST /auto-trading/reset: PASS - Clears all state, resets scan_count to 0
endpoints_verified.GET /auto-trading/status: PASS - Returns is_running, performance metrics, config
endpoints_verified.GET /early-pumps: PASS - Returns detected_pumps list and count
endpoints_verified.POST /scan-early-pumps: PASS - Triggers scan, returns detected and total_scanned
endpoints_verified.GET /smart-wallets: PASS - Returns list of tracked wallets
endpoints_verified.POST /smart-wallets: PASS - Adds wallet, returns SmartWallet object
endpoints_verified.GET /smart-wallets/copy-signals: PASS - Returns pending copy trade signals
endpoints_verified.GET /api-status: PASS - Returns current_api and status for all APIs
endpoints_verified.POST /bot/save-state: PASS - Saves bot state to database
endpoints_verified.GET /bot/recover-state: PASS - Returns saved state or message
endpoints_verified.GET /system/modules: PASS - Returns all 8 module statuses and engine_config

features_verified.auto_trading_start_stop_reset: PASS - All operations work correctly with proper state management
features_verified.early_pump_detection: PASS - Module active, detection logic verified
features_verified.smart_wallet_tracker: PASS - Add/list/remove wallets, copy signals working
features_verified.api_failover: PASS - Health status for dexscreener/birdeye/jupiter tracked
features_verified.activity_feed: PASS - Events logged with correct types (BUY, SELL, SIGNAL, SCAN)
features_verified.system_modules_status: PASS - All 8 modules (market_scanner, early_pump_detector, momentum_analyzer, smart_wallet_tracker, trade_monitor, risk_manager, api_failover, crash_recovery) reporting status
features_verified.german_ui_localization: PASS - All UI labels in German (VERFÜGBAR, IN TRADES, GESAMT P&L, TREFFERQUOTE, etc.)
features_verified.live_pnl_monitor: PASS - Shows Investiert, Aktueller Wert, P&L, Netto-Ergebnis

action_items: Consider removing duplicate endpoint POST /smart-wallets/add (returns 500) - the working endpoint is POST /smart-wallets
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing 100+ closed trades and portfolio data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All trading system modules tested and working: Auto-Trading Engine with 2-second scan interval and high-capacity mode, Early Pump Detector, Smart Wallet Tracker, API Failover (dexscreener/birdeye/jupiter), Crash Recovery with state persistence, Activity Feed with BOT KAUF/VERKAUF events, and System Modules status endpoint. German UI fully localized. The /smart-wallets/add endpoint has a 500 error due to duplicate definition - use POST /smart-wallets instead.
